name: Airport Antiterror
short_description: This is an exciting 3D shooter game set in an airport that has become the center of a zombie apocalypse. You will have to fight hordes of zombies, gather resources, and build a plane to escape. But will you be able to?
detailed_description:
This is an exciting 3D shooter game set in an airport that has become the center of a zombie apocalypse.
You will have to fight hordes of zombies, gather resources, and build a plane to escape. But will you be able to?

Features of this game:

-Brutal zombie attacks: Zombies surround you. You will have to use various strategies to survive.
-Resource gathering: You will need to search for items and parts for the plane. Collect everything that can be useful for survival.
-3D graphics: Immerse yourself in the world of the zombie apocalypse.
-Dynamic battles: Battles with zombies will be intense and adrenaline-filled. Use a variety of weapons to destroy enemies.
